name: mern-starter-new-web
description: Modernized MERN content management starter with React 19, Vite, Express 5 and Mongoose 8.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace client
